notes: B19 + tRPC error format + h2_end_stream=1. Previous tests #273-275 all showed '200 h2' received but mutation errors — the missing END_STREAM flag meant the fetch API never completed, causing the tRPC client to treat the response as failed. Now END_STREAM is sent via 2-frame DATA strategy, so the browser should properly complete the fetch and parse the tRPC JSON response. 프롬프트 입력은 clipboard paste 사용.
